accessibility.description: Line chart showing average monthly temperatures throughout the year. Temperatures range from 5.2°C in January to a peak of 31.2°C in July, then decline to 6.9°C in December.
accessibility.altText: Temperature chart: January 5.2°C, February 7.1°C, March 12.3°C, April 18.5°C, May 23.7°C, June 28.4°C, July 31.2°C (peak), August 30.1°C, September 25.8°C, October 19.3°C, November 12.7°C, December 6.9°C
